import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{Container,Paper,Table,TableHead,TableRow,TableCell,TableBody,Typography}from"@mui/material";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function CandidateList(){const[candidates,setCandidates]=useState([]);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{fetch("http://127.0.0.1:3001/candidates/").then(response=>response.json()).then(data=>setCandidates(data)).catch(error=>console.error("Error fetching candidates:",error));},[]);// 行クリックで候補者詳細へ遷移
